SEARCH

Class UserInterface

java.lang.Object
UserInterface
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, EventListener
public class UserInterface extends Object implements ActionListener
Swing-based graphical shell for the text adventure: log area, text field, directional shortcut buttons, and an optional room image.

Implements ActionListener so both the entry field and buttons forward normalized commands to the GameEngine.

Version:
1.0 (Jan 2003) DB edited (2023)
Author:
Michael Kolling

    Updates the progress bar shown in the UI.

    Loads an image from the classpath (typically under images/) and sets it on the north label, packing the frame to fit.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserInterface

      public UserInterface(GameEngine pGameEngine)
      Builds the frame, layout, and listeners, storing the engine for later callbacks.
      Parameters:
      pGameEngine - the non-null game engine that will interpret commands

  • Method Details

    • print

      public void print(String pText)
      Appends text to the log without a trailing newline and scrolls to the end.
      Parameters:
      pText - fragment to append (may be empty)

    • println

      public void println(String pText)
      Appends a line of text to the log, then scrolls to the end.
      Parameters:
      pText - full line content (a newline is added automatically)

    • showImage

      public void showImage(String pImageName)
      Loads an image from the classpath (typically under images/) and sets it on the north label, packing the frame to fit.
      Parameters:
      pImageName - resource path relative to the class loader root

    • showMap

      public void showMap(String pImageName)
      Loads an image from the classpath (typically under images/) and sets it on the map label.
      Parameters:
      pImageName - resource path relative to the class loader root

    • enable

      public void enable(boolean pOnOff)
      Enables or disables keyboard entry in the command field and toggles caret blink.
      Parameters:
      pOnOff - true to allow typing; false to freeze input at game end

    • createGUI

      private void createGUI()
      Lays out components, registers listeners, and shows the window.

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent pE)
      Dispatches button clicks as canned commands, or reads the text field on Enter.
      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface ActionListener
      Parameters:
      pE - the originating AWT event (button or text field)

    • processCommand

      private void processCommand()
      Reads the entry field, clears it, and forwards the trimmed line to the engine.

    • setProgress

      public void setProgress(int pPercent)
      Updates the progress bar shown in the UI.
      Parameters:
      pPercent - progress percentage (typically 0-100)

    • getProgressBar

      public int getProgressBar()
      Returns the current value of the progress bar.
      Returns:
      progress value
